title: Winter Tour!
bodyHtml:
Thrilled to announce our upcoming Winter Tour. We'll do three dates in Galway, Dublin and Cork on the 16th, 17th and 18th respectively.
I'm particularly excited to play alongside the wonderful
Anna Mieke Bishop for our Cork gig - if you haven't heard her music do check it out - she's amazing!
